name: Melocactus lemairei (Monv. ex Lem.) Miq.
description: По данным GBIF (коллекция UNAM). Морфология и синонимы будут добавлены.
morphology_stem: Melocactus lemairei is a species of cactus endemic to the Caribbean island of Hispaniola. It is named after French botanist and cactus expert Charles Antoine Lemaire.
